title: Dealing with pseudonymization and key files in small-scale research. A few basic steps
author: Kleef, Simone van
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Report of the LCRDM Task Group Pseudonymization. 

 The Dutch version of this report is available under the title: Omgang met pseudonimisering en sleutelbestanden bij kleinschalig onderzoek. Enkele basisstappen 

 Available at Lcrdm.nl: Handout with 9 basic steps (Dutch and English)
